nteShinkuReleaseBanner.title: NTE Shinku Release Date and Banner Guide
nteShinkuReleaseBanner.intro: Use this guide to check Shinku's banner timing, unlock requirement, featured A-Class characters, and milestone cosmetics before spending pulls in Version 1.2.

rows.detail: Goes live after maintenance on July 8, 2026.

rows.label: Featured Character

rows.label: Banner Period

rows.detail: Required before accessing Shinku's limited board.

rows.label: Featured A-Class Characters
rows.detail: These A-Class characters are featured alongside Shinku.

rows.label: Milestone Rewards
rows.detail: 50 rolls: Overcast Canopy glider livery. 120 rolls: Hidden Dragon Blizzard-V4 livery. 200 rolls: Student of Terrasea outfit.

nteShinkuBuildArc.title: NTE Shinku Build and Arc Guide
nteShinkuBuildArc.intro: Shinku's limited S-Class Arc is Blushing Mirage, available through the Resolve Special Arc Research Program during her banner window. This module covers her character type, limited Arc, Arc Research access, currency, and what to check before spending resources.

cards.title: Shinku Profile
cards.description: Shinku is the featured limited S-Class character for Version 1.2 Phase 1.

cards.title: Arc Type
cards.description: Shinku uses a Condensate-type Arc, the current name for Synthesis-type Arcs.

cards.title: Signature Arc
cards.description: Blushing Mirage is Shinku's limited S-Class Arc.

cards.title: Arc Availability
cards.description: The Arc shares Shinku's Version 1.2 Phase 1 availability window.

cards.title: Arc Unlock Requirement
cards.value: Complete "Prologue - A New Destination - Head to Eibon Antique Shop"
cards.description: The same main story requirement applies before accessing the limited Arc program.

cards.title: Where to Pull the Arc
cards.value: Arc Shop > Arc Research Program > Resolve Special
cards.description: Use the Resolve Special Arc Research Program to target Blushing Mirage.

cards.title: Arc Research Currency
cards.description: These are the currencies used to participate in the Resolve Special Arc Research Program.

cards.title: Other S-Class Arcs in the Pool
cards.value: Reality Refuge, Youthful Fantasy, Good Boy's Grand Adventure, Camellia Society, Raging Flames
cards.description: Check the Arc Research details in-game before spending keys.

cards.title: Pull Priority Checklist
cards.description: Secure Shinku from Before the Dawn first if your main goal is the character, then decide whether to spend Arc keys on Blushing Mirage.

nteShinkuSkillsCombat.title: NTE Shinku Skills and Combat Guide
nteShinkuSkillsCombat.intro: Version 1.2 adds Shinku, her official character trailer, and a dedicated in-game combat tutorial. Use this step-by-step guide to learn Shinku safely through official video previews, the in-game combat tutorial, and her Version 1.2 character content.

steps.title: Unlock Shinku's Banner Access
steps.description: Complete "Prologue - A New Destination - Head to Eibon Antique Shop" to access the Before the Dawn Limited Board.

steps.title: Check Her Character Role
steps.description: Shinku is an exclusive S-Class Cosmos character featured in Version 1.2 Phase 1.

steps.title: Review Her Arc Setup
steps.description: Shinku uses a Condensate-type Arc, with Blushing Mirage as her limited S-Class Arc through Resolve Special Arc Research.

steps.title: Watch the Official Character Trailer
steps.description: Use the Version 1.2 Shinku character trailer to preview her animations, combat rhythm, and showcase scenes before pulling.

steps.title: Play the In-Game Combat Tutorial
steps.description: Version 1.2 adds a dedicated combat tutorial for Shinku, making it the best place to learn her timing and controls.

steps.title: Open Shinku Character Content
steps.description: After the update, Shinku receives City Hangouts, Home Time, Bond quests, Bond interactions, and text message conversations.

steps.title: Test Before Heavy Investment
steps.description: Practice Shinku's tutorial and early combat content before committing extra resources to her Arc, outfits, or deeper upgrades.

nteShinkuPullValueTier.title: NTE Shinku Pull Value and Tier Context
nteShinkuPullValueTier.intro: Shinku's pull value comes from official banner facts: she is an exclusive S-Class character, her Limited Board runs from July 8 after the Version 1.2 update until July 29, 2026 at 05:59 UTC+8, and her banner includes Mint, Edgar, and Adler as featured A-Class characters, plus cosmetic milestones at 50, 120, and 200 rolls.

tiers.label: Pull for Shinku
tiers.summary: Best for players who want the new exclusive S-Class character during Version 1.2 Phase 1.
details: Featured on the Before the Dawn Limited Board
Available from July 8 after update to July 29, 2026 at 05:59 UTC+8
Unlocks after completing Prologue - A New Destination - Head to Eibon Antique Shop
Featured A-Class characters: Mint, Edgar, and Adler

tiers.label: Pull for Banner Cosmetics
tiers.summary: Useful for players who care about Shinku cosmetics and limited banner rewards, not just the character.
details: Overcast Canopy glider livery at 50-roll milestone
Hidden Dragon Blizzard-V4 livery at 120-roll milestone
Student of Terrasea outfit at 200-roll milestone
Banner cosmetics can also be obtained randomly through rolls before reaching milestones

tiers.label: Pull for Blushing Mirage
tiers.summary: Consider the signature S-Class Arc if you are building Shinku deeply and want her limited Arc option.
details: Blushing Mirage is the new limited S-Class Arc
Available during the same July 8 to July 29 Phase 1 window
Obtained through the Resolve Special Arc Research Program
Uses Tri-Keys or Resolve Keys in Arc Research

tiers.label: Skip if You Only Want Free Rewards
tiers.summary: Players focused on account growth can still claim Version 1.2 rewards without chasing Shinku.
details: Version 1.2 gives an S-Class Standard Character Selection Box to eligible players
Bug Fix Compensation includes Annulith x300

nteShinkuCharacterProfile.title: NTE Shinku Character Profile
nteShinkuCharacterProfile.intro: Shinku is a new exclusive S-Class character introduced in Version 1.2. Her official profile presents her as an awkward but dependable dragon girl who protects her teammates when missions become dangerous.

cards.title: Official Character Line
cards.value: "I'm not a good person to kill time with."
cards.description: Shinku's profile opens with a reserved, distant tone, matching her official description as someone who can feel hard to approach in everyday life.

cards.title: Personality
cards.description: Shinku is not shown as naturally social, but she becomes reliable once a mission begins. Her profile emphasizes that she is first to step into danger when teammates need protection.

cards.title: Character Role
cards.description: She is the headline S-Class character of the Before the Dawn Limited Board in Version 1.2 Phase 1.

cards.title: Combat Identity
cards.description: Media banner coverage lists Shinku as an S-Class Cosmos character, while her signature limited S-Class Arc is Blushing Mirage.

cards.title: World Context
cards.description: NTE is set in Hethereau, where the player works as an unlicensed Anomaly Hunter connected to Eibon, an antique shop that takes Anomaly commissions.

cards.title: Version 1.2 Focus
cards.description: Shinku is tied to Version 1.2 content, including her Limited Board, character trailer, City Hangout, Home Time, Bond quests, and new outfits.

nteShinkuOutfitsCosmetics.title: NTE Shinku Outfits and Cosmetics
nteShinkuOutfitsCosmetics.intro: Version 1.2 adds multiple Shinku outfits, banner milestone cosmetics, and vehicle or glider livery rewards. Some are shop purchases, while others are tied to the Before the Dawn Limited Board, Bond Level, or the 999 Nights event shop.

outfits.title: Student of Terrasea
outfits.content: Available through the Before the Dawn Limited Board. Players can obtain it randomly by landing on the matching tile or claim it from Resolve Perks after accumulating enough rolls. It is part of the 200-roll banner cosmetic milestone set.

outfits.title: Dragonhunter
outfits.content: Available in the Shop permanently. Discount period runs from July 8 after update to August 19, 2026 at 05:59 UTC+8. Discount price is Riftcrystal x2,680, with original price listed as Riftcrystal x3,280.

outfits.title: Dawn Patrol
outfits.content: Available in the Shop permanently. Discount period runs from July 8 after update to August 19, 2026 at 05:59 UTC+8. Discount price is Riftcrystal x1,680, with original price listed as Riftcrystal x2,480.

outfits.title: Labyrinth Lily
outfits.content: Unlocked after obtaining Shinku and reaching Bond Level 10.

outfits.title: Normie Heroine
outfits.content: Purchased from the 999 Nights Button Shop using event progression from the 999 Nights Mini-Game.

outfits.title: Overcast Canopy
outfits.content: Featured on the Before the Dawn Limited Board and claimable from Resolve Perks at the 50-roll milestone, or obtainable randomly through rolls before the milestone.

outfits.title: Hidden Dragon
outfits.content: Featured on the Before the Dawn Limited Board and claimable from Resolve Perks at the 120-roll milestone, or obtainable randomly through rolls before the milestone.

outfits.title: Tomato Dash and Rose & Violet
outfits.content: Available in the Shop after the July 8 Version 1.2 update. Each purchase uses either Riftcrystal x980 or Fons x3,000,000.

nteShinkuStoryHangout.title: NTE Shinku Story and Hangout Guide
nteShinkuStoryHangout.intro: Version 1.2 adds Shinku-related story and interaction content, including City Hangouts, Home Time, Bond quests, text conversations, a combat tutorial, the new main story episode Fighting with a Dragon, and the Warren Continent location.

steps.title: Start Version 1.2: 999 Nights
steps.description: Update the game after the July 8 maintenance. The Version 1.2 update unlocks Shinku's banner, new story content, new outfits, and new interaction features.

steps.title: Unlock Shinku's Limited Board
steps.description: Complete the main story quest "Prologue - A New Destination - Head to Eibon Antique Shop" to access Shinku's Before the Dawn Limited Board and Blushing Mirage Arc Research.

steps.title: Play Fighting with a Dragon
steps.description: The new main story episode becomes available after Version 1.2. It requires completing Dreamwalk Corridor and reaching Hunter Level 26.

steps.title: Reach Warren Continent
steps.description: Warren Continent is the new location connected to the Fighting with a Dragon story episode, adding fantasy-themed adventure content to the update.

steps.title: Unlock Shinku City Hangouts
steps.description: Shinku's City Hangouts story becomes available after the Version 1.2 update. It unlocks by obtaining Shinku or completing Fighting with a Dragon.

steps.title: Unlock Shinku Home Time
steps.description: Shinku's Home Time Invitation mode unlocks after obtaining Shinku and reaching the required Bond Level.

steps.title: Build Bond with Shinku
steps.description: Version 1.2 adds Bond quests, Bond interactions, passenger seat ride-along interaction, and text message conversations for Shinku.

steps.title: Use the Shinku Combat Tutorial
steps.description: A dedicated combat tutorial for Shinku is added in Version 1.2, helping players learn her playstyle after unlocking or trying the character.

faq.title: Frequently Asked
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about NTE Shinku in Neverness to Everness

questions.question: When does NTE Shinku release in Version 1.2?
questions.answer: NTE Shinku releases after maintenance on July 8, 2026, as the featured S-Class character on the Before the Dawn Limited Board. Her banner runs until July 29, 2026, 05:59 UTC+8.

questions.question: What is NTE Shinku's signature Arc?
questions.answer: NTE Shinku's signature limited S-Class Arc is Blushing Mirage, a Condensate-type Arc available through the Resolve Special Arc Research Program during her Version 1.2 Phase 1 window.

questions.question: How do I unlock NTE Shinku's banner?
questions.answer: To unlock NTE Shinku's banner, complete the main story quest "Prologue - A New Destination - Head to Eibon Antique Shop." This unlocks Shinku's Before the Dawn Limited Board and her Blushing Mirage Arc Research.

questions.question: Which NTE Shinku codes are active?
questions.answer: Active NTE Shinku codes include DRAGONGIRL, WELCOMETONTE, DREAMWALK0603, TOMATO100, RACENOLIMIT, NTENENE, and NTEGIFT. Redeem them from the in-game phone menu.

questions.question: Are there free NTE Shinku cosmetics?
questions.answer: Yes, NTE Shinku offers free cosmetics. The Student of Terrasea outfit is a 200-roll milestone reward, while the Overcast Canopy glider livery and Hidden Dragon Blizzard-V4 livery unlock at the 50 and 120-roll milestones on Shinku's Before the Dawn Limited Board.

questions.question: What platforms is NTE Shinku available on?
questions.answer: NTE Shinku is part of Neverness to Everness, available on PC via Steam, PlayStation 5, and mobile through the App Store and Google Play.
